apps.name: Apollo
apps.subtitle: Apollo for Reddit with Apollo-Reborn
apps.localizedDescription:
Apollo-Reborn is the community-maintained Apollo sideload build powered by the Apollo-Reborn tweak.

It restores custom API support, media fixes, uploads, inline media, translation, saved categories, Liquid Glass support on iOS 26+, and the rest of the project's ongoing fixes and enhancements.

This source mirrors the GLASS Icons variant, which bundles the Liquid Glass alternate icon catalog without the iOS 26 UI runtime opt-in, so legacy UIKit behaviors such as the bottom tab bar swipe gesture are preserved.

This source is intended for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Apollo-Reborn is not compatible with AltStore PAL.

This project is not affiliated with Apollo or Christian Selig.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos to upload for sharing.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to save media or to select images to upload for sharing.
privacy.NSMotionUsageDescription: Detect rotations in Media Viewer and offer corresponding options.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Checked once to calculate sunset/sunrise times for the location.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Unlock Apollo when re-opening in order to prevent unauthorized access.

versions.localizedDescription:
Upstream asset: "Apollo-Reborn-3.1.1-GLASS.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
> [!NOTE]
> We're aware of reports that Reddit has started revoking some users' API keys. Please see [our new updated instructions](https://github.com/Apollo-Reborn/Apollo-Reborn#dont-have-an-api-key) for workarounds.
>
> AltStore, SideStore, Feather sources can be found at https://apolloreborn.app/#download

- Fix a crash when sharing a post to Messages or Mail from the share sheet — the system compose controller was misidentified as an Apollo composer, leaving GIF-toolbar injection timers that dereferenced the dismissed share UI and crashed (#378: @nickclyde)
- Fix Reddit login on iOS 15 by automatically falling back to Old Reddit, and add an Old Reddit button to the auth view for users who need to switch manually (#377: @DeltAndy123)
- Fix video controls overlay rendering, including the AirPlay button getting clipped or misaligned (#383: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix flair alignment so post and user flairs no longer sit too low or clip their text (#389: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix Color Flairs reverting to grey or the wrong shade after returning to Apollo from the background (#391: @icpryde)

apps.versionDescription:

> We're aware of reports that Reddit has started revoking some users' API keys. Please see [our new updated instructions](https://github.com/Apollo-Reborn/Apollo-Reborn#dont-have-an-api-key) for workarounds.

- Fix a crash when sharing a post to Messages or Mail from the share sheet — the system compose controller was misidentified as an Apollo composer, leaving GIF-toolbar injection timers that dereferenced the dismissed share UI and crashed (#378: @nickclyde)
- Fix Reddit login on iOS 15 by automatically falling back to Old Reddit, and add an Old Reddit button to the auth view for users who need to switch manually (#377: @DeltAndy123)

- Fix flair alignment so post and user flairs no longer sit too low or clip their text (#389: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix Color Flairs reverting to grey or the wrong shade after returning to Apollo from the background (#391: @icpryde)

apps.name: Plezy
apps.subtitle: A Plex and Jellyfin client
apps.localizedDescription: A modern cross-platform Plex and Jellyfin client.

versions.localizedDescription:
Upstream asset: "plezy-ios.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Added

- Jellyfin extras support
- Jellyfin metadata editing
- Video and audio quality labels
- tvOS Top Shelf support
- New app menus
- Mobile settings shortcut in the home menu
- Mobile library browse options sheet
- A startup section setting
- Faster loading for large show detail pages

Improved

- More consistent back navigation
- Better TV and dpad focus behavior
- Better access to app bar actions on TV
- More UI text is localized

Fixed

- Jellyfin artwork uploads
- Jellyfin default track selection
- Subtitle search when no subtitle tracks exist (#1219)
- ExoPlayer transcode seek positions
- Player chrome overlay stability
- Play-next looping at end of file
- iOS video zoom and stretch fit
- iOS anamorphic video aspect ratio
- iOS frozen video after Control Center
- Profile 8 Dolby Vision decoding
- tvOS remote playback controls
- tvOS HDR toggle behavior
- Live TV time-shift skip overshoot
- Watch Together recent room actions on dpad

Upstream asset: "plezy-ios.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Fixed

- macOS playback crashes caused by LuaJIT under hardened runtime
- Android playback crashes on devices without HDR display mode API support

Full Changelog: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/2.4.0...2.4.1

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses the local network to control to media servers and players.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to scan QR codes for Companion Remote pairing.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app needs to connect to your media servers on your local network.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Plezy uses location access when iOS requires it to detect your local network and connect to your media servers.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Plezy needs photo library access so you can choose images to upload as media artwork.
privacy.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow notifications from friends, recommendations, your media server and more.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Your data will be used to deliver the most relevant ads when watching free movies and shows.

apps.name: Twitch
apps.subtitle: Twitch with TwitchAdBlock
apps.localizedDescription:
Twitch with the unofficial TwitchAdBlock tweak for sideloading.

It blocks live-stream and VOD ads, removes feed promotions and ad-network requests, supports authenticated and fallback proxies, renders 7TV, BetterTTV, and FrankerFaceZ emotes in chat, and adds app customization options.

This source mirrors the patched Twitch IPA published by gunnerkidBT's TwitchAdBlock fork. The fork maintains compatibility with newer Twitch and iOS versions and is not affiliated with Twitch Interactive.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Twitch needs permission to access the camera on this device to stream live video and change your profile image.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Twitch uses the local network to discover Cast-enabled devices on your WiFi network.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Twitch needs permission to access the microphone on this device to stream live video.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Twitch needs permission to write to your photo library in order to save images.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Your iOS advertising ID and device data will be used to support creators and provide a personal ad experience.
